name: Pumpkin Poundcake with Brown-Sugar-Walnut Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Combine flour, baking soda, salt and spice in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat together the dark brown sugar, granulated sugar, butter, egg, pumpkin puree and vanilla until well mixed and light.
4. Stir in the flour mixture, raisins and chopped macadamia nuts.
5. Spoon batter onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for about 20 minutes or until slightly browned along the edges.
7. Allow to cool on a flat surface.
